summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Smart Campus Management System including backend APIs, frontend UI, and role-based authentication. All core functionality verified as working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height dimensions (-1)
Minor visibility issue with navigation elements in mobile sidebar

passed_tests: Dashboard Stats API with correct data (20 students, 5 faculty, 3 departments)
Student CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Frontend login page with demo credentials
Admin dashboard with stat cards and charts
Student management page with 20 students listed
Faculty management page with 5 faculty listed
Attendance management UI (subject selection, student listing)
Notice board access for all roles
